'''''Kolermigon''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] captured during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces encountered ''Kolermigon'' in the final engagement of the [[Battle for Honor]], just prior to the capture of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]]. It was stationed on Rebel Outpost ''[[DS 5]]'' loading Rebel evacuees as the Imperial Navy launched its final assault on the platform. Imperial [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|''Alpha''-class Xg-1 Star Wing]] assault gunboats disabled ''Kolermigon'', prior to its capture by [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transport]] ''Omega''. Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] boarded the craft and captured its Rebel occupants before ''Kolermigon'' entered the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] of [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Garrett (Star Destroyer)|''Garrett'']].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
